fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the campaign.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the campaign is valid. There are certain rules for how dates should be entered.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last day on which this campaign is valid.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the salesperson responsible for the campaign.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a comment has been assigned to the campaign.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the campaign card was last modified. This field is not editable.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series you have applied to the campaign.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Status Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status code for the campaign.

fields.name: Target Contacts Contacted
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of target contacts that you have contacted with this campaign. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Contacts Responded
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of contacts who have responded to the campaign. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Duration (Min.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total time it took to complete all the interactions linked to the campaign. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost of all the interactions created as part of the campaign. This field is not editable.

fields.name: No. of Opportunities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of opportunities created as part of this campaign. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Estimated Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated value of the opportunities created as part of this campaign. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Calcd. Current Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calculated current value of the opportunities linked to the campaign. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains the starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval. For example, the Cost (LCY) field shows the cost of the campaign for that interval only.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Action Taken Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an action taken filter. There are six options:
Next

Previous

Updated

Jumped

Won

Lost


For example, if this field contains the option Next, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities for which that particular action was taken.

fields.name: Sales Cycle Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a sales cycle filter.
If this field contains a sales cycle code, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities created using that particular sales cycle.

fields.name: Sales Cycle Stage Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a sales cycle stage filter.
If this field contains a sales cycle stage code, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities currently under that particular stage.

fields.name: Probability % Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a probability filter.
If this field contains a percent, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities having that particular probability.

fields.name: Completed % Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a completed percentage filter.
If this field contains a percent, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities with that percentage of completion.

fields.name: Contact Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for contacts.

fields.name: Contact Company Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a contact company filter.
If this field contains Yes, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information linked to contact companies.

fields.name: Estimated Value Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an estimated value filter.
If this field contains an amount (LCY), fields such as No. of Opportunities and Calc. Current Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities with that particular estimated value.

fields.name: Calcd. Current Value Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a calculated current value filter.
If this field contains an amount (LCY), fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities with that particular current calculated value.

fields.name: Chances of Success % Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a chances of success filter.
If this field contains a percent, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities with that particular chance of success.

fields.name: Task Status Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a to-do status filter. There are five options:

Not Started


In Progress


Completed


Waiting


Postponed


If this field contains the option Postponed, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities linked to postponed to-dos.

fields.name: Task Closed Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a closed to-do filter.
If this field contains Yes, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities linked to closed to-dos.

fields.name: Priority Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a priority filter. There are three options: Low, Normal, and High.
If this field contains the option High, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities linked to to-dos with a high priority.

fields.name: Team Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a team filter.
If this field contains a team code, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to that particular team.

fields.name: Salesperson Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a salesperson filter.
If this field contains a salesperson code, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to that particular salesperson.

fields.name: Opportunity Entry Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies that one or more opportunities are linked to the campaign.

fields.name: Task Entry Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies that one or more to-dos are linked to the campaign.

fields.name: Close Opportunity Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for closed opportunities.

fields.name: Activated
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a sales lines price discount has been activated. After you set up a campaign and create segments for it, you can create discounts for targeted audiences.
